subject: [PATCH v2 090/110] minix: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: The reviewer pointed out that the patch only partially replaced PRIino format strings in minix code, leaving some instances unchanged.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch is good and suggested adding a Reviewed-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces the use of PRIino format macro in the minix file system code with concrete format strings %llu and %llx, which are suitable for printing u64 values. This change is necessary because PRIino has been removed from the kernel. The patch updates several printk statements to use these new format strings, ensuring that inode numbers are printed correctly even when they exceed 32-bit limits.
